title: Stack with Min
description: Implement a stack that supports push, pop, top, and retrieving the minimum element in O(1) time.
description_zh: 实现一个栈，支持 push、pop、top 和 O(1) 时间获取最小值。
starter_code:
class MinStack:
    def __init__(self):
        # Your code here
        pass

    def push(self, val):
        # Your code here
        pass

    def pop(self):
        # Your code here
        pass

    def top(self):
        # Your code here
        pass

    def get_min(self):
        # Your code here
        pass

# Test
s = MinStack()
s.push(3); s.push(5); s.push(1); s.push(2)
print(s.get_min())  # 1
s.pop()
print(s.top())      # 1
print(s.get_min())  # 1
hint: Maintain a second stack that tracks the minimum at each state. Push to min_stack only when the new value <= current min.
hint_zh: 维护一个辅助栈，同步记录每个状态的最小值，只有当新值 <= 当前最小值时才入辅助栈。
test_assertions:
s = MinStack()
s.push(3);s.push(5);s.push(1);s.push(2)
assert s.get_min() == 1
s.pop()
assert s.top() == 1
assert s.get_min() == 1
print('All tests passed!')

title: Implement a Queue with Two Stacks
description: Implement a queue using two stacks. The queue should support enqueue, dequeue, and peek operations.
description_zh: 用两个栈实现一个队列，支持入队、出队和查看队首操作。
starter_code:
class QueueWithStacks:
    def __init__(self):
        # Your code here
        pass

    def enqueue(self, val):
        # Your code here
        pass

    def dequeue(self):
        # Your code here
        pass

    def peek(self):
        # Your code here
        pass

# Test
q = QueueWithStacks()
q.enqueue(1); q.enqueue(2); q.enqueue(3)
print(q.dequeue())  # 1
print(q.peek())      # 2
hint: stack_in for enqueue, stack_out for dequeue. When stack_out is empty, transfer all from stack_in.
hint_zh: stack_in 负责入队，stack_out 负责出队。stack_out 为空时，将 stack_in 的内容全部倒入。
test_assertions:
q = QueueWithStacks()
q.enqueue(1);q.enqueue(2);q.enqueue(3)
assert q.dequeue() == 1
assert q.peek() == 2
assert q.dequeue() == 2
print('All tests passed!')

title: Binary Search Tree Validation
description: Given the root of a binary tree, determine if it is a valid BST. A BST's left subtree contains only nodes less than the node, and right subtree contains only nodes greater than the node.
description_zh: 给定二叉树的根节点，判断它是否为有效的二叉搜索树（BST）。左子树所有节点小于当前节点，右子树所有节点大于当前节点。
starter_code:
# Definition of TreeNode:
class TreeNode:
    def __init__(self, val=0, left=None, right=None):
        self.val = val
        self.left = left
        self.right = right

def is_valid_bst(root):
    # Your code here
    pass

# Build tree: [2,1,3]
tree1 = TreeNode(2, TreeNode(1), TreeNode(3))
print(is_valid_bst(tree1))  # True

# Build tree: [5,1,4,null,null,3,6]
tree2 = TreeNode(5, TreeNode(1), TreeNode(4, TreeNode(3), TreeNode(6)))
print(is_valid_bst(tree2))  # False
hint: Pass lower and upper bounds down the recursion. At each node, check it falls within the valid range.
hint_zh: 递归时传递有效范围的上界和下界，在每个节点检查其值是否在范围内。
test_assertions:
t1 = TreeNode(2, TreeNode(1), TreeNode(3))
assert is_valid_bst(t1) == True
t2 = TreeNode(5, TreeNode(1), TreeNode(4, TreeNode(3), TreeNode(6)))
assert is_valid_bst(t2) == False
print('All tests passed!')

title: Hash Map Implementation
description: Implement a simple hash map from scratch with put(key, value) and get(key) methods. Use separate chaining for collision handling.
description_zh: 从头实现一个简单哈希表，支持 put(key, value) 和 get(key)，使用链地址法解决冲突。
starter_code:
class HashMap:
    def __init__(self, size=16):
        # Your code here
        pass

    def _hash(self, key):
        # Simple hash function
        return hash(key) % self.size

    def put(self, key, value):
        # Your code here
        pass

    def get(self, key):
        # Your code here
        pass

# Test
hm = HashMap()
hm.put('name', 'Alice')
hm.put('age', 30)
print(hm.get('name'))  # Alice
print(hm.get('age'))   # 30
print(hm.get('none'))  # None
hint: Store key-value pairs as tuples in a list (bucket). When putting, update if key exists or append; when getting, search the bucket.
hint_zh: 用列表（桶）存储键值对。put 时更新或追加，get 时在桶中查找。
test_assertions:
hm = HashMap()
hm.put('name','Alice')
hm.put('age',30)
assert hm.get('name') == 'Alice'
assert hm.get('age') == 30
assert hm.get('none') is None
hm.put('name','Bob')
assert hm.get('name') == 'Bob'
print('All tests passed!')

title: Trie (Prefix Tree)
description: Implement a Trie with insert(word), search(word), and startsWith(prefix) methods.
description_zh: 实现一个字典树（前缀树），支持 insert(word)、search(word) 和 startsWith(prefix) 操作。
starter_code:
class Trie:
    def __init__(self):
        # Your code here
        pass

    def insert(self, word):
        # Your code here
        pass

    def search(self, word):
        # Your code here
        pass

    def startsWith(self, prefix):
        # Your code here
        pass

# Test
t = Trie()
t.insert('apple')
print(t.search('apple'))     # True
print(t.search('app'))       # False
print(t.startsWith('app'))   # True
hint: Each node is a Trie itself with a children dict and an is_end flag. Navigate by characters during search.
hint_zh: 每个节点包含 children 字典和 is_end 标志，按字符导航完成搜索。
test_assertions:
t = Trie()
t.insert('apple')
assert t.search('apple') == True
assert t.search('app') == False
assert t.startsWith('app') == True
t.insert('app')
assert t.search('app') == True
print('All tests passed!')
